---
name: New Article Request
about: Suggest a new knowledge base article for PETOS
title: "[ARTICLE] Propose a title for the new article"
labels: documentation, enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### What problem will this new article solve?
A clear and concise description of the knowledge gap this article will address. (e.g., "Our team frequently struggles with X, and a runbook would help.")

### Which stack does this article belong to?
Please specify which technology stack this article should be placed in (e.g., `operations-observability`, `cybersecurity`, `data-platforms`).

### Who is the target audience?
Describe the primary audience for this article (e.g., "Junior DevOps Engineers", "Senior Security Analysts", "All Engineers").

### Additional Context
Add any other context, links to existing (but incomplete) documentation, or resources that would be helpful for the author.
